seoTitle: How to Set Up Your Support Email in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to connect your support email address to Freshdesk so incoming messages automatically become tickets.
intro: Connecting your support inbox to Freshdesk is one of the first setup steps for any new account, turning incoming emails into trackable tickets. This guide walks through the process.

steps.heading: Open email settings
steps.body: In the admin panel, navigate to the section for configuring support email addresses.

steps.heading: Add your support email address
steps.body: Enter the email address customers currently use, or set up a new dedicated support address.

steps.heading: Verify email ownership
steps.body: Complete any verification steps required, such as confirming a code sent to that address.

steps.heading: Configure forwarding if needed
steps.body: If keeping your existing email provider, set up forwarding rules so messages route into Freshdesk.

faq.question: Can I use my existing business email with Freshdesk?
faq.answer: Yes, you can connect an existing email address, often by setting up forwarding to your Freshdesk account.

faq.question: Do I need a new email address for Freshdesk?
faq.answer: No, you can either use a Freshdesk-provided address or connect your own existing one.

faq.question: Will customers notice a difference once support email is set up?
faq.answer: No, customers can typically keep emailing the same address while Freshdesk manages ticket creation behind the scenes.

faq.question: Can I connect multiple support email addresses?
faq.answer: Yes, Freshdesk generally supports adding multiple email addresses tied to different products or departments.
